title: Spellcasters Chronicles

title: Spellcasters Chronicles

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT (radeonsi, gfx1201, ACO, DRM 3.64, 7.0.2-2-cachyos)
notes:
The game worked alright for about three weeks, although VSync and settings had to be turned down. Map 'Nordic Shore' caused frames to drop to 15 FPS, even on lowest settings on my system which meets ALL their recommended requirements. 

Although fun, it's clearly still in early beta, as it IS an early access game, and I don't expect it to work for a while. Needs more optimization as well.
title: Spellcasters Chronicles
